case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC VS. JENNIFER A. RIVERA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND SUPPLEMENTAL DEC FILED BY PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC SERVED FEB-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT RIVERA, JENNIFER A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, JENNIFER A. $3,310.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,310.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
